mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_CustomerListDetails_follow_info (userid, remark, createtime, description, createTime2, addWay, operUserid, externalUserid) VALUES
(#{item.userid}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createtime}, #{item.description}, GETDATE(), #{item.addWay}, #{item.operUserid}, #{item.externalUserid})
mapper.select: SELECT id, userid, externalUserid, remark, description, createtime, addWay, operUserid, createTime2 FROM VX_CustomerListDetails_follow_info

SELECT userid, externalUserid FROM VX_CustomerListDetails_follow_info WHERE externalUserid IN
#{eid}
